text:
Market today: The market mood is mixed, with no clear broad driver for tech/chip names from today's headlines. Specific company news (Rivian) shows volatility, which is a risk for your leveraged positions.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down -33.81% and a leveraged decay product. SPAL, a brand-new and very volatile leveraged ETF you just entered, is already down -19.56% and needs close monitoring given margin amplifies drops. QQQI is near its stop at -1.77%.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged ETFs, SOXL and SPAL, for any further downside. Also, monitor CRWD for a potential pullback to its scanner accumulation zone.

Bottom line: Focus on risk management for your leveraged positions and respect your stops to prevent further deep drawdowns.
plays: SOXL: This leveraged position is down significantly (-33.81%). Consider trimming or exiting if it doesn't recover quickly, especially with its decay nature.
QQQI: Watch your stop at 52 closely. If it breaks, trim as your scanner suggests.
CRWD: Your scanner shows an ACCUMULATE signal for CRWD (entry 195.27-193.91, stop 190.55). Consider adding if it pulls back to this range.
